Hero.title: Your Construction Back Office - Done Right
Hero.subtitle: We handle your back office, so you can focus on building your business.
Hero.description: Builders Desk provides remote estimating, administrative, project management, bookkeeping, and operational support for US design and construction companies—so you can focus on what you do best.

Process.title: HOW WE DO IT
Process.tagline: Built for Contractors Who Are Tired of Doing Everything Themselves
Process.description: We take the work off your plate so you can focus on winning jobs and delivering projects.

discovery.title: DISCOVERY
discovery.description: We learn about your company, challenges, and specific needs through an in-depth consultation.

plan.title: PLAN
plan.description: We tailor a support package with the right services and frequency for your business.

execute.title: EXECUTE
execute.description: In one week, we will select and onboard the right team member to commence working on your projects.

grow.title: GROW AND SCALE
grow.description: As you expand, we scale with you — adding services or hours as needed.

Clients.label: Our Clients
Clients.title: We believe each client is a long term partnership

Contact.title: CONTACT US
Contact.scheduleDescription: Schedule a 30min. call to learn how The BuildersDesk can support your growth and give you relief.
